title: FeastAssetComponent
description: Materialize features from a source table into a Feast feature store via materialize_incremental or materialize.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

feature_store_repo_path.description: Path to the Feast repository directory that contains feature_store.yaml.

feature_views.description: Specific feature view names to materialize. When null all feature views are materialized.

incremental.description: Use materialize_incremental (from last materialization) when true, or full-range materialize when false.

start_date_env_var.description: Name of an environment variable holding an ISO-8601 start date. Required when incremental is false.

end_date_offset_days.description: Days before UTC now to use as end_date. 0 means current UTC time.
